examples: Lauren Kornberg, right, stretches before the start of the Laker Girls cheerleading auditions Saturday at Toyota Sports Center.
The Chemistry Nobel Prize in 2006 is awarded by Roger Kornberg for his fundamental studies of the molecular basis of eukaryotic DNA transcription.
The researchers built on fundamental discoveries on the structure and replication of DNA made by Nobel laureates James Watson, Francis Crick and Arthur Kornberg.
